final:
module async_up_counter (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [63:0] count
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 64'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
